reviews.review_text:
Used the mini golf ⛳
Great fun for the family.
Friendly staff.
Great price 👍🏻
Friendly service.
Always a great place to stay, friendly welcoming staff, fantastic amenities, close to all attractions, will definitely be back.
Clean and lovely place to stay, staff even gave us some tips on places to visit

I thought the park was tired. Gardens showed little care, big weeds, woody plants that needed to be pruned. The showers had no where to place your soap, shampoo and conditioner. Very expensive price for what the park offers its guests. Bus services to Hobart and from the city were limited.
A neat caravan park but extremely expensive (for a powered) site compared with all the other places we stayed.

We stayed in caravan park.
The innovative bathroom is amazingly simple and clean. Been to hundreds of caravan park but the bathroom here was incredible. 👍
Near to Airport which is best to choose before leaving Hobart.

Stayed here for 5 nights while exploring the area. The sites were spacious, flat & well maintained. We were on site 4 which (sites 1 to 6) are kind of segregated from the main camp area. If you're social then these sites aren't for you. The amenities block we used (there's 2) was clean & tidy. The camp kitchen was small but well equipped.

Easily the best caravan park we’ve stayed at in two years of travelling Australia – and that’s saying something! It feels like a peaceful, semi-rural escape, yet it’s only 15 minutes from Hobart’s CBD. The caravan sites are spacious and separated by neat hedges for extra privacy – unlike many parks where trailers are crammed together on concrete or dirt slabs.

You’re surrounded by a touch of bush, and every morning the local wildlife drops by: bandicoots, pademelons, native hens, and magpies, all so friendly they might as well be residents.

The owners and staff are incredibly warm and welcoming. Stuart and Patrick are the nicest guys you could meet, always up for a chat. Martin, the owner, is a legend for fishing advice and travel tips.

The amenities are clean and looked after.

Perfect location, great facilities, amazing people – can’t recommend it enough.

I have stayed here at least three times while working in the area and it is always clean and tidy, great atmosphere and the staff are really friendly and helpful.
Some of the cabins are a bit older and dated but still comfortable and are self contained with everything you need to cook for yourself.
60 bucks is outrageous for little unpowered campervan spot. Free internet but we were pretty far away from wifi i didn't work either..

Nice caravan and cabin park, good location to base yourself and see the area less than 15 minutes from centre of Hobart, staff were great, facilities were good, has a great mini golf course and an excellent Thai Restaurant

It was a very tidy park with some good facilities.  The male showers although clean the fact that their was only one drain for I think 4 showers meant that the adjacent waste water ran l past me on the floor. The park was quiet and well laid out. Thanks.
태즈매니아 여행을 마무리하는 캠핑장이었습니다. 도심과 공항에서 가까워 쾌적하고 편리하게 잘 이용했습니다.

Schöner Caravan-Park mit Thai-Restaurant und Minigolf zu korrekten Preisen, vor der Tür Bus nach Hobart. Wir waren bei  Ankunft und Abflug jeweils ein paar Tage hier, um uns in unserem gemieteten Camper einzurichten und wieder aufzuräumen.  Der Platz ist großzügig mit Bäumen, Sträuchern und Hecken angelegt - abends beobachteten wir Wallabys und Bandicoots, Vögel sind den ganzen Tag zu sehen. Schöner Sonnenuntergang!!! Sehr relaxed!

We spent two nights there on a powered site. This campground is the first in all of Australia to charge $1 for using a barbecue. Even in public areas, barbecuing is free. It used to cost extra, but not anymore. The showers have a 7-minute timer, which is plenty of time for a hot shower. If you don't want to use the facilities in the main building, there are additional shower and toilet blocks behind the barbecue area. The camp kitchen is small and only has one table, but it's well-equipped. The children's playground was lovely. The location is not far from several wineries, and the drive into town isn't too long.
Nice campervan park with clean toilets and showers. Power, and water point and waste dump point are available.

Barilla Holiday Park exceeded my expectations with its beautiful grounds and well-maintained facilities. The staff was incredibly welcoming and helpful throughout my stay. Perfect location for a relaxing getaway with plenty of activities nearby. The accommodations were comfortable and clean, offering great value for money. Highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a peaceful holiday destination.

Wir waren 5 Nächte auf dem Caravanplatz. Der Caravanplatz ist gut gelegen, es ist nicht weit von der Stadt und dem Flughafen. |Hobart ist sehr schön und es gibt viel zu sehen .Schade ist, dass der Campingplatz so teuer ist: 70 $ für eine Nacht, Waschmaschine funktioniert nur kalt und dann auch noch 5 Dollar!!|Sanitäranlagen gewöhnungsbedürftig und zu wenig davon. Duschzeit auf 5 Minuten begrenzt, dann geht auch noch das Licht aus und du machst in der Dusche einen Hampelmann damit das Licht wieder angeht und nach 1 Minute hast du wieder 5 Minuten... Kein Pool, leblosen Spielplatz, aber Minigolf noch extra bezahlen lassen. Weiterempfehlung???
Beautiful site, we stayed in a campervan. Not to inprest with the Thai restaurant on sit.

In de buurt van Hobart. Parkeer bij Big W Rosny Parc en neem de bus naar het centrum.
Er rijden wel bussen vanaf de camping, maar niet veel.
Goede faciliteiten.
Vriendelijk, behulpzaam team.
Has its own putt putt . Also Thai restaurant on site which is supposed to be yummy .Very neat park. Showers were good

We had a campervan. We stayed there when we arrived in Hobart and decided to go back there.We loved how it had the hedges are groomed gardens are beautiful. The shower,  Toilet  kitchen, laundry are clean. Very quiet and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Also they are on a bus route to Hobart and stops at different places on the way to Hobart. Just ask the office and they have timetables available.  I must also say that they have mini putt and a Thia Restaurant and takeaway it is definitely a must to eat. You aren't to far away from Richmond.

Very helpful and friendly staff
Nice powered spots

Great service. Very friendly and hospitable staff. Plenty of powered and non powered sites for motorhomes and RV. Good communal area with clean bathrooms and kitchen. Just make sure to book in advanace. They book out quickly. Pro tip- call them instead of booking online they give you 10% off.

Thanks team!
Helped us out of a bind by getting us in at short notice ❤️
Great park, great location, affordable and the host was very helpful and friendly. Definately recommend this place.

We had 3 night stay at Barilla holiday park cabin 17. The booking process was easy direct with the office over the phone with Patrick who was very helpful. Even though we reached after office hours (late night) Patrick had made arrangements to get our keys and securely access our accomodation. The location itself is close to places of interest including some good cafe, distilleries, wineries and airport.

Rooms were clean and perfect for a family of 4. Though close to these we felt like miles away with beautiful hill side views local wildlife including bunny rabbits, family of masked lapwing etc and also a kids park which kept children entertained during our stay. They also have a Thai restaurant on site. Would definitely visit again on our next visit to Tasmania.
Great caravan park to be based in Hobart. Super close to bellrieve and the ferry into Hobart to avoid traffic.  Recommend.
Plenty of space, could easily fit a van and car in the spots provided.  Hedges around the powered sites give privacy.  Good clean ammenities and very nice Thai food available!
truly a great location to park and branch out, would recomend it, the powered bays are lge and dry, and the bus service into hobart was great 👍
Wonderful camp-site. Thai restaurant on site was incredible too!
Very clean and well organised. Love the look of a very special tent site which was surrounded by a nice hedge.
Good value for money and lovely location. Thanks for having us for the weekend :)

A favourite park - I’ve been to many across Aus so it means something. Staff are always kind & courteous & extend a helping hand for anything at all. Grounds were perfectly sculpted & amenities consistently cleaned. Wifi all around & CCTV being installed before we vacated. 15 minutes to the city but it feels like you’re in the bush. You won’t be disappointed.
Would definitely recommend. Beautiful place, little wildlife hang around, quiet, great amenities and the owners are LOVELY

Nice sites, but the park in the middle of nowhere really.
Yummi Thai food is very nice and opens most evenings

Location was good. The young man in the office was very helpful and friendly.
Facilities were very clean and the sites very well maintained. Would recommend
The Barilla holiday park
Great camp sites. Fantastic converted water tanks into amenities and hedge rows between sites for privacy
Camping site
Good spot close to Hobart.

Da die anderen Campingplätze alle voll waren, haben wir hier unser Glück versucht und haben auch einen schönen Stellplatz bekommen. Es gibt alles, was man benötigt... Duschen, Toiletten, Waschmaschinen, BBQ's und auch einen kleinen Spielplatz. Die Kinder konnten alleine los und alles erkunden.
Second stay here, rooms are dated but everything very clean and comfortable.  Ideal for a couple of days. Restaurant was very good. Grounds well maintained and neat. Staff friendly and helpful.

A lovely campsite with clean facilities and a welcoming host. While it’s not centrally located, it’s conveniently close to the airport, just a 20-30 minute drive from the city.
The price was reasonable—we paid $59 for a powered site at the last minute and really appreciated that they fit us in despite being quite busy. The area is quiet and feels very safe.
If you’re a whisky lover, Sullivan’s Distillery is just around the corner, making this a great stop.
Thank you for the wonderful stay!

Stayed at Barilla on the monday night of march long weekend. Staff were absolutely amazing giving us directions over the phone as we took a wrong turn. Room was clean and bed was comfortable along with parking right at the door. Park is tidy and we had a peaceful night. From Cheryl and Martin right down to the lovely cheerful cleaning lady who chatted to us next morning this park deserves A+A+A+ Great place to stay with good prices and well worth checking out ...
Very neat and well run. Good location close enough to Hobart. Can take bus from stop outside primary school. New design easy to use dump point.
A beautiful place to stay very quiet and close to all shops,cages etc, would highly recommend it to anyone who comes to Tassie.
Even the park was already fully booked, Martin gave us a heartly welcome and made us a site clear. The park itself is very clean and lovely. Highly recommended!

Wir kamen relativ spät hier an und eigentlich gab es auch kein Platz mehr für unseren Campervan. Aber Martin hat alles erdenkliche gemacht, damit wir hier doch bleiben konnten. Ein wunderschöner und sehr gepflegter Campingplatz mit Privatsphäre. Vielen Dank 🙏

An average caravan park. The sites were ok and neatly bordered by hedges. The sites had synthetic grass which was good but the rest was dirt and quite dusty. The biggest failure was the lack of toilets. They had some converted water tanks that provided showers and toilets and a shower toilet block but only a few toilets. Most mornings you had to wait. Didn’t seem enough to match the people.

Reasonably quiet good value and trust me we walked out on 2 places. Great place close to everywhere easy access .
great restaraunt pity its only open 5 nights.
Was advised pool wont be available anymore due to insurance costs.
Was expensive for laundry $5 / machine and drier needed 2 runs ,yes i clean filters.
Staff great friendly.
Units/cabins good clean comfy.
Quiet and peaceful.

Great campsite. Good amenties - excellent showers. Good setting and layout of camping and powered sites. On-site Thai restaurant is amazing but make sure you check their opening times and or book. Close enough to Hobart city for city visits without the hustle-bustle of staying in the city. Close to beautiful Richmond for a day visit.

We were accommodated very well by the Barilla Staff. 1 days before Christmas and nothing was an issue.
We typically camp off grid so had an overpowered site which was big enough for our set up.
Their facilities were excellent. Beautiful spacious toilet/shower blocks near by in addition to usual amenity block.
The laundry (much needed after 2 weeks off grid) was affordable and excellent equipment and very clean.
Staff were lovely and always willing to smile and chat.
Thank you for having us.
We’ll be back.
TravelMc’s

One of the best sites for camping. Location was excellent, 5 min. to Cambridge shopping centre & max. 10-15min. to city using the highway..
We stayed at a powered camp site. They have a camp kitchen with 5 burner gas stove for all patrons to use until 12am everyday. 2 fridges to place your cold items in (Generally full, because of the capacity of people enjoying their holidays) The kitchen also has a microwave, & a ready to drink coffee machine yielding instant coffee for $2. They also have a shower facility (X4) with (X4) toilets &, a coin operated laundry area. There is even a BBQ area that is coin operated $1 for 17min. although we didn’t end up using it. Overall, every basic necessity was available at your door step. Highly recommend staying at this site for the ease & convenience of location, & facilities.
It felt almost like home away from home.. (We lived only 10min. away from the site)
Awesome campground, clean shower and bathroom facilities. Incredibly helpful check-in staff. Highly recommend!

Stayed at Barilla Holiday Park twice over the course of our road trip around Tasmania. Julie made us feel so welcomed and went out of her way to accommodate us. The park is lovely, the amenities are clean and the sites are a good size. There were no ducks, but the Thai restaurant next door had duck on their menu.

Recently stayed for 2 nights on our self drive around Tassie. Close to airport. Park was lovely and quiet, in rural setting, amenities were great and RV site was partitioned off with green hedges, private. Ladies in reception were very helpful and gave ideas for attractions. Great place to start and end our holiday. Would recommend
A wonderful well laid out caravan park with lots of good facilities, neat, tidy and clean.
We spent 4 nights at Barilla holiday park. The staff were extremely helpful. Both Simone and Julie-Anne. Couldn’t have asked for anything better. It’s the service that sells the place
Staff were awsome, cleaning staff also great clean facilities and Thai was yummmo

Great spot away from the noisier caravan park options closer to suburbia in Hobart
The powered sites were great - tidy, private and well appointed.
Amenities were good - had everything we needed.
!! Nice place, toilets clean, powered for motorhomes or caravans.  Highly recommended!!!!!
Great facilities and location. Amenities are clean, sites good size, and plenty of privacy. Local to everything you could need!

We booked a van space in the campground for our arrival but ended up staying cosy in a cabin. Unfortunately we had to pay for our van space as well. The cabin was very comfortable for a first night arrival from the airport. The cabin had all facilities and a comfortable bed. On our last night before flying out we stayed in our van in a van space. That was fine but I missed the comfort of a cabin. I certainly didn't like getting up at 3am to find the toilet facilities. There wasn't much of a playground according to the children and the pool and advertised hot spa pool was not available. On the upside there was a great Thai restaurant for our arrival evening. The food was very tasty. It feels like being in the country but is not a long drive into the City and conveniently close to the airport.

We stayed in this lovely place close to the airport after we picked up the motorhome before we headed off on our trip around the isle ….. the most clean amenities we have experienced so far … well done to all staff… front counter / reception lady on duty was extremely friendly and helpful with thoughts and ideas for our trip …. The Hedges separating the space of the powered site were thoughtful and well set out to provide privacy and clear separation parking parameters to reverse into .. again well thought out … whole holiday park was extremely clean and tidy

We had a powered site. Plenty of room for the van, awning & car. Every bay was separated by a small hedge. We stayed for two weeks, venture south and are back again. The staff are very obliging & friendly. It is so conveniently located on the outskirts of the city. You feel like you’re in the  country with only a short drive to the big smoke of Hobart. We will definitely be back & can highly recommend this park. Oh! Love  the resident bandicoot, rabbits and strange bush chooks. I personally would call them roadrunners. They run everywhere and make the strangest sound. All making it a special place to stay.

5 dollar if you want only take a shower!
Very clean, hot and the manager is very kind!
Room's are clean
Compact powdered tent campsites for my family of three great stay. Kitchen and toilets are among the cleanest across Tasmania. Would return.
Good spot for overnight parking.

We were warmly welcomed by staff and in no time we were on site. There was easy access for our campervan. All facilities were close at hand and were very well maintained. The camp kitchen provided excellent cooking facilities. It was busy but we cooked our meal with a friendly group of travellers and enjoyed the experience.

We stayed in a tent on a powered site, staff were very helpful in locating us in an appropriate site. The park is conveniently located between Hobart and Richmond and is an ideal base to see things in Hobart and Southern Tasmania. The amenities are good and include camp kitchen and laundry facilities. Would definitely return
Lovely park close to Hobart. Caravan sites  are spacious and private. Each site is surrounded by a hedge. Sites and amenities are very clean. Staff were friendly and helpful. We will be back.
Great staff and nice

Great sized site. Loved the hedges in between each site for a bit of added privacy.

The water tank ensuites were also great and super spacious. Dunno if it's possible, but adding a fan into them could be useful. They do get really hot in the afternoons.

Also loved the visits from the Bandicoots
Nice holiday park love staying thier

We stayed in a medium sized  motorhome in the campground section for 2 nights. It is not a new park but is well maintained and quiet with clean facilities. Time has allowed the growth of some large trees and thick hedges on 3 sides of each powered site which create ambience & privacy. We were grateful for the efforts of Jodie who ensured we got a site despite huge demand. It was this caring attitude that made staying at Barilla a really great choice.
Friendly at reception, fun little outdoor course, ambient music playing outside was a nice touch.
Jodie has been a great host. Wonderful place to live. Highly recommended

We camped on a powered site, good facilities, staff are lovely, very friendly and helpful. Mini golf was fun too! We even got to see some little bandicoots and met a family of turbo chooks (native hens). Would definitely stay again!
Yummy Thai was great   very friendly staff and the food was delicious,  definitely coming back 😋

Place is in need of some work

The playground is two tiny slides off some rocks, 90% of park is gravel. Do avoid if travelling with kids

The putt putt is in need of work also, the greens surface is absolutely worn out so the balls travel wherever gravity takes it which 99% of the time is out of bounds, I struggled greatly with it and the kids gave up after 6 holes as it’s not fun like that, a new surface and tidy up and that would no longer be an issue

The lady at desk was very kind, I’m sure it’s ok for those without kids

This is the perfect first and last stop on your holiday. Took about 10 min to drive from airport. Quiet, clean and all the clean amenities you need. I camped my first 4 nights on un powered site the first week of Jan and at last minute I asked if a cabin would be avail the night before I flew home. The ladies at reception were so helpful and so friendly. It's so nice to deal with people who go above and beyond to help!!!! Perfect place to base yourself and see all the sites. So close to Hobart you can't go wrong.
We have a campervan. The staff were very friendly, all the amenities were very clean. I would recommend this park to everyone.
Nice clean caravan park and cabins, has great authentic Thai restaurant for eat in or take away.
Next time I visit tassie, I'll be coming back here for sure. Very welcoming and such a beautiful place and location... Thanks so much for your help and loved the chats...😊

Very friendly and helpful service when booking. Late check in was no problem as I arrived on a late flight from WA. Most excellent location close to the airport. Cabin at the back of the park was great...clean, comfortable and quiet. Bus stop to Richmond right out the front. Will stay again.
Fantastic service when we got there. Great amenities, we had our van here as a point to call home when we visited Hobart

Great spot close to Hobart and surrounds, clean and tidy with all the amenities you need while travelling. We stayed in a powered site for the night with a motorhome and the price was very reasonable.

The mini-golf has too be the best in Australia.
Layout and planting, 10/10.

Barilla Holiday Park is what I would call a great location. Not on top of the hustle and bustle, but close enough to a motorway and a quick 17 minutes to the heart of Hobart. Barilla has all the facilities you need including a Putt Putt course and wild life.

Travelling with my low vision sister in a campervan. I found the powered sites to be spacious and private. Each site fenced with hedges. Easy access, also a dump point right beside site. |We were close to clean, tidy amenities. |Thanks 🙂

Absolutely awesome caravan park.. amenities clean and serviceable, but little dated if anything.. powered site best we have had with lovely hedges for extra privacy.. mini golf brilliant bonus.. best Thai restaurant been to in a long time.. easy to get to Hobart and beautiful surrounding towns.. absolutely 💯 recommend and we will be back..
Nice place to stay near Hobart and the airport. Close to shops. Clean and comfortable
Friendly professional staff clean and tidy.
Great park clean , central to where we were visiting.  Hot tub was good and relaxing .
